nature_language:
We are a group of 5, departing from Nanjing to Beijing for a 2-day trip, and must meet at least one of the following conditions:
1. Prefer not to dine at the following restaurants: Yangzhou Banquet (Beijing Branch) and Chao Shang Chao (Zhengda Branch)
2. Accommodation should be within 4.18 km of Divine Music Office
